rationale: Sprint 14 (P0 durability) is a known, procedural task with obvious cause-effect: commit the uncommitted .council/audit-log.jsonl, git rm the two stale worktree gitlinks, reconcile session-noise to reach an empty git status, and push the branch. Best-practice applies directly; there is no novel design space. The only non-routine element is the push of 49 local-only commits, which is a human-gated irreversible action (not an analytical uncertainty). Classified clear with high confidence; the residual 0.15 covers possible surprises in what the audit-log/worktree cleanup touches.
